findings.location: s2 (国際化したプロパティの表示名称の取得方法)
findings.description: The source's second h2 section contains 3 h3 subsections ('＠PropertyName の messageId 属性を使用する方法', 'プロパティ名に対応する表示名称を使用する方法', '2つの方法の選択基準') and its total plain text clearly exceeds 2000 characters. Per V3 rules, when an h2 section has >= 2000 chars AND h3 subsections exist, the knowledge file should split into separate sections with distinct IDs. Instead, all three subsections are merged into a single s2 section using internal ### headings.
findings.source_evidence: RST source has three ===-underlined h3 headings under the second h2: '@PropertyName の messageId 属性を使用する方法', 'プロパティ名に対応する表示名称を使用する方法', '2つの方法の選択基準'. Combined these subsections contain multiple code blocks, two message tables, an XML configuration snippet, and a comparison table.
